zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Poyner於1485年出生在英國史洛普爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas Poyner22歲，母親Lucia Eaton18歲。她於大約1505年與Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor在英國英格蘭史洛普爾隆諾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1543年10月22日在英國史洛普爾隆諾享年58歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾隆諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Poyner于1485年出生在英国史洛普爾时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Poyner22岁，母亲Lucia Eaton18岁。她于大约1505年与Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor在英国英格兰史洛普爾隆諾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1543年10月22日在英国史洛普爾隆諾享年58岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾隆諾。

nameMeanings.name: Poyner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands; of Norman origin): nickname for a fighter, from Anglo-Norman French poigneur, pugneire ‘fighter, warrior’ (from Latin pugnator, from pugnare ‘to fight’, a derivative of pugnus ‘fist’).

variants.name: Poynor
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Leicestershire; of Norman origin): variant of   Poyner  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Poyner was born in 1485, in Shropshire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Poyner, was 22 and her mother, Lucia Eaton, was 18. She married Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor about 1505, in Longnor, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 22 October 1543, in Longnor, Shropshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Longnor, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Poyner est née en 1485, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Poyner, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lucia Eaton, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor environ 1505, à Longnor, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 22 octobre 1543, à Longnor, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Longnor, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Poyner 1485 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Poyner 22 und ihre Mutter Lucia Eaton 18. Sie hat um 1505 in Longnor, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 22. Oktober 1543 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Longnor, Shropshire, England und wurde in Longnor, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Poyner è nata il nel 1485 nel Shropshire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Poyner, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Lucia Eaton, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor circa 1505, nel Longnor, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 22 ottobre 1543, nel Longnor, Shropshire, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Longnor, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Poynerが1485年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Poynerは22歳，母Lucia Eatonは18歳であった。約1505年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアロングノーでSir Knight John Burton of Longnorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1543年10月22日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアロングノーで58歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアロングノーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Poyner(이)가 1485년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Poyner(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucia Eaton(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 론뇰르에서 Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1543년 10월 22일 영국 슈럽실르 론뇰르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 론뇰르에 묻혔다.

pt.Newport, Isle of Wight, England: Newport, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Poyner nasceu em 1485, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Poyner, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lucia Eaton, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor aproximadamente 1505, em Longnor, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 22 de outubro de 1543, em Longnor, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Longnor, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Newport, Isle of Wight, England: нюпорт, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Poyner родилась в 1485 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Poyner было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lucia Eaton, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor около 1505 г. в местности лонгнор, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 22 октября 1543 г. в местности лонгнор, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности лонгнор, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Poyner nació en 1485, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Poyner, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Lucia Eaton, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor aproximadamente 1505, en Longnor, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 22 de octubre de 1543, en Longnor, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Longnor, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
